WEEK_COUNT.description: The number of unbroken weeks the Fractal has run Respect Games, as of the current update. Bump this number alone when the streak count changes - do not add qualifying words here, each paper phrases the surrounding sentence in its own voice (e.g. "100+ unbroken weeks", "100+ weeks", "over 100+ weeks").

OG_RESPECT_CONTRACT.description: OG Respect (ERC-20) contract address on Optimism. Frozen as of December 2025 - should not change again, but centralized here in case of any future migration.

ZOR_RESPECT_CONTRACT.description: ZOR Respect (ERC-1155) contract address on Optimism, issued weekly via OREC starting Fractals 74+.

OG_HOLDER_COUNT.description: Live OG Respect holder count on Optimism. Update alongside OG_HOLDER_ASOF_DATE whenever re-checked on-chain.

OG_HOLDER_ASOF_DATE.description: The date OG_HOLDER_COUNT (and the rounded top-5/top-10 concentration stats, which are NOT yet tokenized - see docs/shared-facts.md) was last live-checked against Optimism Etherscan.

WAVEWARZ_RETENTION_PCT.description: Percent of every dollar traded in WaveWarZ that stays in the ecosystem (98.5% trader retention + artist bonuses, 1.5% platform fee). Identical precision in every paper that cites it, unlike the OG-holder concentration percentages which intentionally differ by audience (rounded vs exact).
